| 旧名 | 新名 |
|------|------|

| `BaseView` | `BaseOntoView` |

| `PartCategoryView` | `PartCategoryInstViewImpl` |
| `PartCategorySumView` | `PartCategoryInstSumViewImpl` |
| `PartView` | `PartInstViewImpl` |
